specs.title: getSession returns null for unauthenticated user
JWT is valid via auth.getUser
onAuthStateChange fires SIGNED_IN on login

Empty password returns 400
Sign out with valid JWT returns 204
After sign out, client getSession returns null
Sign out without JWT returns 401

updateUser with valid session and valid password works

GET /categories?select=* returns all categories with correct structure
GET /categories?select=id,slug returns only id and slug fields
GET /categories?select=*&eq(slug,vehicles)&single() returns correct category
GET /categories?select=*&eq(slug,housing)&single() returns correct category
GET /categories?eq(slug,__invalid__)&single() returns error for non-existent slug
Categories returned in a consistent order (no display_order column in DB)
Get category by slug with hyphens works correctly
Uppercase slug is case-sensitive and returns error

Admin fetch pending listings returns results
Admin can update listing status
